subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast and firm in the Covenant and Testament! That which was written hath been noted, and whatsoever was recorded hath been considered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت راسخ بر عهد و میثاق آنچه مسطور بود ملحوظ گشت و هر چه مرقوم بود منظور
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the power of words; of speech, @firmness in the Covenant, @composure; tranquillity; serenity
